name: Seismic Sales Enablement API
what_it_does: Seismic REST API for revenue enablement and sales content management platform. Enables AI agents to query and retrieve sales content, access buyer engagement analytics, manage content libraries, trigger personalized content delivery, and integrate Seismic enablement data into CRM and sales workflow automation. Seismic is the market leader in enterprise sales enablement.
use_cases: Retrieving relevant sales content and playbooks from sales workflow agents
Tracking buyer engagement with content from revenue analytics agents
Managing content library and version control from marketing operations agents
Integrating Seismic content usage data into CRM opportunity management agents
not_for: Small businesses without enterprise sales teams
best_when: An enterprise revenue team using Seismic wants AI agents to surface relevant sales content, track buyer engagement, and integrate content performance data into CRM workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Buyer engagement tracking collects behavioral data. Enterprise contracts govern data usage. API access requires Seismic enterprise agreement.

auth.notes: Seismic API uses OAuth 2.0. App registration through Seismic developer portal. Enterprise access required. Scopes govern content read/write and analytics access.

pricing.notes: Enterprise-only platform. Pricing per seat, negotiated with Seismic sales.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in enterprise portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Buyer engagement behavioral data requires consent and data governance
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API integration required
Public API documentation limited — enterprise customers get private developer docs
Seismic content model (Workspaces, Libraries, DocCenter) requires understanding before integration
API access requires Seismic enterprise agreement and developer portal registration
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Buyer engagement tracking and content analytics. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 with scopes. EU data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Buyer engagement data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 with scopes.
